# A partitioning drive line splits a simple rectangle into two
# regions. Each region can have its own aisle orientation.

polygon outer
0,0
300,0
300,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

# Vertical chord from bottom to top, flagged as partitioning.
drive-line partitions
150,0
150,200
----
drive-line: 150,0 -> 150,200 partitions

generate
----
total_stalls: 190
